RT @mtrainier2020: A ResNet is an LSTM rotated 90 degrees

把网络的计算过程想象成一个表格
- 横轴是time step，
这是 RNN / LSTM 的天然维度  
- 纵轴是depth / layer index…

This, but for real*

Here’s METR-style graph of labor displacement from Roman aqueducts, doubling time of CDDII years. Lesson:
1) Displacing terrible work is good
2) All exponentials become s-curves in the end
